source_jobs.title: Senior Brand Manager (m/w/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE is a leading international provider of online lottery products, operating for over 20 years with brands like LOTTO24 and Tipp24. As Germany’s largest digital lottery operator and a trusted partner of Spain’s ONCE, we are passionate about shaping the future of lottery experiences.

 

LOTTO24 is Germany’s leading online provider of state-licensed lottery products, offering customers convenient and secure access to popular games like LOTTO 6aus49, Eurojackpot, and GlücksSpirale. As a trusted partner of the state lotteries, LOTTO24 ensures that every ticket sold helps support charitable, social, and community projects across Germany. By combining ease of play, trusted security, and meaningful social contributions, LOTTO24 exemplifies ZEAL’s vision of making lottery participation more accessible while giving back to society.




THE ROLE:

As our Senior Brand Manager, you play a key role in bringing our marketing and brand strategy to life by translating strategic direction into impactful campaigns and creative initiatives across all channels. You drive full-funnel brand activities with a high level of ownership, ensuring consistent and high-quality brand execution across all customer touchpoints. Working closely with cross-functional teams, agencies, and external partners, you combine strategic thinking, creativity, and data-driven decision-making to strengthen brand positioning, drive growth, and deliver measurable business impact.




YOUR TASKS:

 - Translate strategic direction into effective brand marketing activities across channels and touchpoints

 - Collaborate closely with media, CRM, creative, and product teams to ensure a consistent brand experience

 - Lead and execute integrated marketing campaigns across multiple channels

 - Manage agencies, content creators, and the internal Creative Studio to deliver high-quality marketing communications

 - Use market research, customer insights, and competitive analysis to identify growth opportunities

 - Optimize marketing activities and campaign performance based on analytics and data insights

 - Align marketing initiatives with product, legal, and compliance requirements

 - Manage marketing budgets and ensure efficient resource allocation

 - Report campaign performance and key learnings to senior leadership




WHAT YOU OFFER US: 

 - Several years of experience in a similar brand or marketing role

 - Strong understanding of brand marketing and positioning in a digital environment

 - Analytical mindset with experience using data and customer insights to drive decisions

 - Broad knowledge of relevant marketing channels, from brand to performance marketing

 - Hands-on experience planning and executing integrated marketing campaigns

 - Experience working with creative teams, agencies, and content productions

 - Strong project management and organizational skills

 - Experience managing budgets and optimizing marketing spend

 - Experience working with analytics, attribution, and marketing measurement models

 - Professional proficiency in German, both written and spoken

 - Experience in performance marketing, CRM, or evidence-based marketing is a plus

 - Experience in e-commerce and start-up or scale-up environments is a plus




WHAT WE OFFER:

 - A modern, dynamic culture grounded in the success of a leading-edge e-commerce company.

 - A talented team of ambitious, like-minded colleagues where your knowledge and ideas truly make an impact.

 - Ongoing personal growth, supported by an annual development budget of €1,500 to invest in your professional development.

 - Trust and autonomy, no micromanagement, just confidence in your ability to deliver and excel.

 - Flexible work options with a hybrid setup focused on results.

 - Unlimited vacation days in addition to your yearly 30-day vacation allowance.

 - Opportunity for workations abroad using our WorkFlex tool.

 - Monthly mobility allowance of €30 to use on the mobility option of your choice

source_jobs.title: Werkstudent:in Marketing (w/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE ist ein führender internationaler Anbieter von Online-Lotterieprodukten und seit über 20 Jahren mit Marken wie LOTTO24 und Tipp24 aktiv. Als Deutschlands größter digitaler Lotterieanbieter und vertrauenswürdiger Partner von ONCE in Spanien gestalten wir mit Leidenschaft die Zukunft des Lotterieerlebnisses.

 

Traumautoverlosung ist eine der neuesten und aufregendsten Marken von ZEAL. Sie macht den Traum vom eigenen Wunschauto greifbar: mit einem Ticket sichern sich Spielende die Chance auf ein exklusives Fahrzeug. Gleichzeitig unterstützt jede Teilnahme soziale Projekte, sodass aus der Gewinnchance ein echter sozialer Mehrwert entsteht. Die Traumautoverlosung verbindet den Nervenkitzel des Gewinnens mit einer bedeutenden sozialen Auswirkung und spiegelt damit ZEALs Engagement für Innovation und soziale Verantwortung wider. Sie bietet den Teilnehmenden mehr als nur ein Spiel - die Chance, Gutes zu tun und gleichzeitig groß zu träumen.



Für unser Traumautoverlosung-Team suchen wir jemanden, der Lust auf Social Media, Content und digitale Trends hat. Du unterstützt uns dabei, unser Start-up auf Social Media weiter wachsen zu lassen, bringst eigene Ideen mit ein und bist nah dran am Aufbau einer Marke, die gerade dabei ist, richtig groß zu werden.




DEINE AUFGABEN:

 - Unseren Social-Auftritt Stück für Stück auf das nächste Level bringen (deiner Kreativität sind hier keine Grenzen gesetzt 🚀)

 - Assets und Content für Instagram, TikTok & YouTube erstellen

 - Ein echtes Gefühl dafür entwickeln, was Menschen feiern, teilen und kommentieren

 - Community, Trends und Performance immer mit im Blick haben




WAS DU MITBRINGST:

 - Eingeschriebene:r Student:in (z. B. Marketing, Medien, Kommunikation, BWL, Digital Business o. ä.)

 - Interesse an Autos und Auto-Content (du musst hier aber wirklich kein Auto-Experte sein ☺️)

 - Begeisterung für TikTok, Instagram, YouTube & aktuelle Trends

 - Erste Erfahrung mit Social Media, Postings oder Content Creation

 - Gutes Gespür für Trends, Formate und virale Inhalte

 - Idealerweise schon erste Erfahrung mit Canva (aber kein Muss)

 - Strukturierte, eigenständige und zuverlässige Arbeitsweise

 - Sicherer Umgang mit den gängigen Office- und Kollaborationstools (MS 365, etc.)

 - Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse

 - Gute Englischkenntnisse




WAS WIR ANBIETEN:

 - Eine moderne, dynamische Unternehmenskultur, basierend auf dem Erfolg eines innovativen E-Commerce-Unternehmens.

 - Ein talentiertes Team aus ambitionierten, gleichgesinnten Kolleg*innen, in dem dein Wissen und deine Ideen wirklich etwas bewegen.

 - Vertrauen und Eigenverantwortung – kein Mikromanagement, sondern echtes Vertrauen in deine Fähigkeiten, hervorragende Ergebnisse zu liefern.

 - Flexible Arbeitsmöglichkeiten mit einem hybriden Arbeitsmodell, das auf Resultate fokussiert ist.

 - Möglichkeit zu Workations im Ausland über unser WorkFlex-Tool.

 - Monatlicher Mobilitätszuschuss von 30 €, den du für das Verkehrsmittel deiner Wahl nutzen kannst (z. B. das Deutschlandticket), sowie Zugang zu einem Fahrrad-Leasing-Programm.

 - Betriebliche Altersvorsorge in Zusammenarbeit mit Degura zur Absicherung deiner finanziellen Zukunft.

 - Geförderte EGYM WELLPASS-Mitgliedschaft – du zahlst nur 25 € pro Monat und erhältst Zugang zu zahlreichen Fitnessstudios und Sportangeboten in ganz Deutschland.

 - Monatliche Firmenevents sowie regelmäßige Teamaktivitäten und informelle Treffen – besonders beliebt: unsere kostenlose Lunches von Montag bis Donnerstag im Büro!



Bereit, Product & Marketing mitzugestalten?
Dann schick uns deinen Lebenslauf! Willst du dich besonders hervorheben? Dann schicke uns ein kurzes Video (z. B. via GDrive, WeTransfer oder YouTube), in dem du uns zeigst, warum du zu uns passt.



Wir freuen uns auf dich! 🎯

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager (f/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE is a leading international provider of online lottery products, operating for over 20 years with brands like LOTTO24 and Tipp24. As Germany’s largest digital lottery operator and a trusted partner of Spain’s ONCE, we are passionate about shaping the future of lottery experiences.

 

Freiheit+ is one of ZEAL's new German state-licensed social lottery that gives participants the chance to win €5,000 every month for 15 years, plus a one-time prize of €250,000. Every ticket sold supports educational projects, with at least 30% of proceeds directly funding initiatives for a good cause. Freiheit+ perfectly combines the dream of lifelong financial freedom with the opportunity to make a real difference, reflecting ZEAL’s commitment to offering innovative, socially impactful lottery experiences.

 

As our Senior Product Manager, you will own the end-to-end growth and retention strategy, driving customer acquisition, engagement, and long-term loyalty. You will focus on maximizing customer lifetime value through funnel optimization, conversion improvements, and the development of features that enhance subscriber retention and engagement. Working in a fast-paced, product-led environment, you'll combine strategic thinking with hands-on execution, operating with an entrepreneurial mindset to continuously improve the subscriber experience and accelerate business growth.



 


YOUR TASKS:

 - Own our digital conversion funnel end-to-end, supporting performance and brand marketing to acquire new customers, running continuous A/B tests on landing pages and checkout flows to minimize drop-offs.

 - Design and scale features built for a recurring business model including churn prevention loops, subscription loyalty drivers, and upsell flows.

 - Combine quantitative analytics with qualitative research to reduce uncertainty, analyze user behavior via Google Analytics, Tableau dashboards, and those data trends through user interviews and surveys.

 - Lead a dedicated agile team (engineering, UX/UI, user research, data analytics), maintaining high alignment, high velocity, and clear data-driven goals.

 


WHAT YOU OFFER US:

 - Proven track record of taking an existing digital product, optimization framework, or core feature set and scaling it significantly. Exceptional leadership skills to steer and cooperate with cross-functional stakeholders, marketing teams, and developers.

 - Deep understanding of Abo (subscription) mechanics, recurring revenue loops, and retention strategies. A candidate should have a genuine heart for the user and know how to build delightful, habit-forming digital experiences that keep subscribers engaged between lottery draws.

 - Hands-on experience mapping out frontend event tracking requirements and utilizing tools like Google Analytics or Amplitude.

 - Highly capable of leveraging both quantitative data and lightweight qualitative research to validate trends, eliminate uncertainty, and uncover the real "why" behind user behavior.

 - Experience managing or steering native iOS/mobile app development is a strong plus as we would like to create our Freihiet+ mobile app.

 


WHAT WE OFFER YOU:

 - A modern, dynamic culture grounded in the success of a leading-edge e-commerce company.

 - A talented team of ambitious, like-minded colleagues where your knowledge and ideas truly make an impact.

 - Ongoing personal growth, supported by an annual development budget of €1,500 to invest in your professional development.

 - Trust and autonomy, no micromanagement, just confidence in your ability to deliver and excel.

 - Flexible work options with a hybrid setup focused on results.

 - Unlimited vacation days in addition to your yearly 30-day vacation allowance.

 - Opportunity for workations abroad using our WorkFlex tool.

 - Monthly mobility allowance of €30 to use on the mobility option of your choice (e.g., the Deutschlandticket), plus access to a company bike leasing program.

 - Company pension scheme

source_jobs.title: Team Lead Engineering - Traumhausverlosung (f/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE is a leading international provider of online lottery products, operating for over 20 years with brands like LOTTO24 and Tipp24. As Germany’s largest digital lottery operator and a trusted partner of Spain’s ONCE, we are passionate about shaping the future of lottery experiences.


Traumhausverlosung is one of ZEAL’s newest and most exciting brands. It gives players the chance to win stunning, fully furnished dream homes through an accessible, thrilling lottery format, while supporting a good cause. Every ticket sold not only offers participants the opportunity to transform their lives, but also contributes to charitable projects, making a real difference in communities across Germany. By combining the excitement of winning with a meaningful social impact, Traumhausverlosung reflects ZEAL’s commitment to innovation, social responsibility, and offering customers more than just a game, but a chance to do good while dreaming big.



As our Engineering Team Lead (f/m/d), you combine strong people leadership with hands-on technical expertise to guide and grow a high-performing engineering team. You drive architectural and technical decisions together with your team while actively contributing to the codebase and solving complex challenges. In close collaboration with Product Management and UX, you help shape product and technology strategies that balance business goals, customer experience, and technical excellence. With a pragmatic and ownership-driven mindset, you foster cross-team collaboration, enable your team to thrive, and ensure the delivery of scalable, maintainable, and impactful solutions.




YOUR TASKS:

 - Lead, mentor, and develop engineers, including performance management, feedback, and professional growth

 - Lead technically and strategically, define and drive architectural decisions together with your team

 - Code as part of the team: While guiding architecture and strategy, you’ll regularly write code, contribute to features, and help solve complex technical challenges together with your team

 - Act as a sparrings partner for product management and UX, working closely with them to define and drive product and tech strategies

 - Bridge architecture, product and UX: Deliver robust and maintainable technical solutions while focusing on great customer experiences and business needs

 - Drive collaboration: Work closely with other teams to align APIs, technical interfaces, and architectural consistency

 - Prioritize intelligently: Balance technical ambition with pragmatic delivery, and work closely with product, UX and other stakeholders to reduce internal friction



 


WHAT YOU OFFER US:

 - Proven people leadership skills with the ability to develop others and build trust

 - Empowering leadership style that enables rather than micromanages

 - Leadership experience in managing an engineering team (ideally in a cross-functional context)

 - Strong and up-to-date hands-on experience working with Next.js (App Router, Server Functions, Server Components), TypeScript, and HTML5/CSS3

 - “You build it, you run it” mindset and experience in deploying, monitoring, and maintaining a web application

 - Experience in e-commerce environments

 - Ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions

 - Excellent organizational and prioritization skills in dynamic settings

 - Strong communication skills with the ability to align diverse stakeholders

 - Proactive, ownership-driven mindset



 


WHAT WE OFFER YOU:

 - State-of-the-art technologies and an agile environment (Check our Tech Radar: https://lotto24.github.io/tech-radar/)

 - A modern, dynamic culture grounded in the success of a leading-edge e-commerce company.

 - A talented team of ambitious, like-minded colleagues where your knowledge and ideas truly make an impact.

 - Ongoing personal growth, supported by an annual development budget of €2,500 to invest in your professional development.

 - Trust and autonomy, no microman

source_jobs.title: Team Lead Product Management (f/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE is a leading international provider of online lottery products, operating for over 20 years with brands like LOTTO24 and Tipp24. As Germany’s largest digital lottery operator and a trusted partner of Spain’s ONCE, we are passionate about shaping the future of lottery experiences.

LOTTO24 is Germany’s leading online provider of state-licensed lottery products, offering customers convenient and secure access to popular games like LOTTO 6aus49, Eurojackpot, and GlücksSpirale. As a trusted partner of the state lotteries, LOTTO24 ensures that every ticket sold helps support charitable, social, and community projects across Germany. By combining ease of play, trusted security, and meaningful social contributions, LOTTO24 exemplifies ZEAL’s vision of making lottery participation more accessible while giving back to society.

As Team Lead Product Management (f/m/d) – Core Platform, you lead a group of Product Managers responsible for domain-based platform services. Your mission is to ensure consistent, high-quality product management across teams and enable the Core Platform to deliver reliable, scalable, and valuable capabilities.




YOUR TASKS:

 - Lead and manage a team of Product Managers within Core Platform, including coaching, mentoring, and supporting their growth in product thinking, execution, and stakeholder management.

 - Own hiring, onboarding, and career development while fostering a culture of ownership, accountability, and continuous improvement.

 - Ensure strong product management standards across teams, including effective use of roadmaps, prioritization, validation, and documentation.

 - Drive consistent, outcome-driven product development with high transparency and clarity in decision-making across teams.

 - Oversee delivery and operational alignment across platform teams to ensure predictable and high-quality execution.

 - Align planning, prioritization, and execution processes across Product Managers and teams.

 - Identify and resolve cross-team dependencies, risks, and delivery bottlenecks.

 - Support teams in balancing short-term delivery with long-term platform investments.

 - Partner closely with the Lead Product Manager Platform as well as engineering leadership and stakeholders to ensure strong cross-functional collaboration.

 - Translate Core Platform strategy into clear, actionable direction for Product Managers.




WHAT YOU OFFER US:

 - Proven experience in leading and developing a team of Product Managers, including coaching on product thinking, execution, and stakeholder management.

 - Strong experience translating strategy into clear product direction and execution across multiple teams.

 - Experience driving product strategy in complex environments and ensuring clear execution across multiple teams.

 - Deep product management expertise in prioritization, roadmapping, discovery, validation, and KPI-based decision-making.

 - Ability to establish and scale consistent, high-quality product processes across teams.

 - Strong cross-functional leadership skills, with the ability to align Product, Engineering, Data, and Business stakeholders.

 - Solid understanding of platform products (e.g. APIs, services, scalability, reuseability)

 - Ability to work closely with engineering on technical constraints and architecture trade-offs.

 - Continuous improvement and impact-oriented mindset, focused on improving processes and delivering meaningful business value.




WHAT WE OFFER YOU:

 - A modern, dynamic culture grounded in the success of a leading-edge e-commerce company.

 - A talented team of ambitious, like-minded colleagues where your knowledge and ideas truly make an impact.

 - Ongoing personal growth, supported by an annual development budget of €2,500 to invest in your professional development.

 - Trust and autonomy, no micromanagement, just confidence in your ability to deliver and excel.

 - Flexible work options with a hybrid setup focused on results.

 - Unlimited

source_jobs.title: Werkstudent:in Projektmanagement - Traumhausverlosung (w/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE ist ein führender internationaler Anbieter von Online-Lotterieprodukten und seit über 20 Jahren mit Marken wie LOTTO24 und Tipp24 aktiv. Als Deutschlands größter digitaler Lotterieanbieter und vertrauenswürdiger Partner von ONCE in Spanien gestalten wir mit Leidenschaft die Zukunft des Lotterieerlebnisses.


Traumhausverlosung ist eine der neuesten und aufregendsten Marken von ZEAL. Sie gibt Spielenden die Chance, atemberaubende, komplett eingerichtete Traumhäuser durch ein einfach zugängliches, spannendes Lotterieformat zu gewinnen und gleichzeitig einen guten Zweck zu unterstützen. Jedes verkaufte Los bietet den Teilnehmenden nicht nur die Möglichkeit, ihr Leben zu verändern, sondern trägt auch zu wohltätigen Projekten bei, die in Gemeinden in ganz Deutschland einen echten Unterschied machen. Die Traumhausverlosung verbindet den Nervenkitzel des Gewinnens mit einer bedeutenden sozialen Auswirkung und spiegelt damit ZEALs Engagement für Innovation und soziale Verantwortung wider. Sie bietet den Teilnehmenden mehr als nur ein Spiel - die Chance, Gutes zu tun und gleichzeitig groß zu träumen.




DEINE AUFGABEN:

 - Unterstützung bei der Planung, Koordination und Nachbereitung von Immobilien- und Home-Staging-Projekten.

 - Koordination von Terminen mit Handwerkern, Dienstleistern und internen Ansprechpartnern.

 - Vorbereitung, Begleitung und Nachbereitung interner sowie externer Meetings.

 - Organisation von Möbeln, Dekoration, Materialien und Projektlogistik.

 - Pflege von Projektplänen, Checklisten, Statusübersichten und Dokumentationen.

 - Einholung, Vergleich und Verwaltung von Angeboten externer Dienstleister.

 - Erstellung und Pflege von Inventarlisten.

 - Recherche zu Immobilienmärkten, Interior-Design-Trends, Dienstleistern und Materialien.

 - Allgemeine administrative und operative Unterstützung im Tagesgeschäft und in laufenden Projekten.

 - Optionale Unterstützung vor Ort im „Traumhaus“.




WAS DU MITBRINGST:

 - Aktives Studium in Betriebswirtschaft, Immobilienmanagement, Projektmanagement, Bauwesen oder einem vergleichbaren Studiengang für mindestens 1 Jahr.

 - Erste praktische Erfahrungen im Projektmanagement sind von Vorteil.

 - Sicherer Umgang mit MS Office, insbesondere Excel, PowerPoint und Outlook.

 - Ausgeprägte Organisations- und Koordinationsfähigkeiten und eine eigenständige Arbeitsweise.

 - Kommunikationsstärke im Umgang mit Kunden, Dienstleistern und internen Ansprechpartnern.

 - Zuverlässigkeit, Flexibilität und Belastbarkeit in einem dynamischen Projektumfeld.

 - Führerschein Klasse B.

 - Fließende Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse.




WAS WIR ANBIETEN:

 - Eine moderne, dynamische Unternehmenskultur, basierend auf dem Erfolg eines innovativen E-Commerce-Unternehmens.

 - Ein talentiertes Team aus ambitionierten, gleichgesinnten Kolleg*innen, in dem dein Wissen und deine Ideen wirklich etwas bewegen.

 - Vertrauen und Eigenverantwortung – kein Mikromanagement, sondern echtes Vertrauen in deine Fähigkeiten, hervorragende Ergebnisse zu liefern.

 - Flexible Arbeitsmöglichkeiten mit einem hybriden Arbeitsmodell, das auf Resultate fokussiert ist.

 - Möglichkeit zu Workations im Ausland über unser WorkFlex-Tool.

 - Monatlicher Mobilitätszuschuss von 30 €, den du für das Verkehrsmittel deiner Wahl nutzen kannst (z. B. das Deutschlandticket), sowie Zugang zu einem Fahrrad-Leasing-Programm.

 - Betriebliche Altersvorsorge in Zusammenarbeit mit Degura zur Absicherung deiner finanziellen Zukunft.

 - Geförderte EGYM WELLPASS-Mitgliedschaft – du zahlst nur 25 € pro Monat und erhältst Zugang zu zahlreichen Fitnessstudios und Sportangeboten in ganz Deutschland.

 - Monatliche Firmenevents sowie regelmäßige Teamaktivitäten und informelle Treffen – besonders beliebt: unsere kostenlose Lunches von Montag bis Donnerstag im Büro!

source_jobs.title: CRM Technical Expert (f/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE is a leading international provider of online lottery products, operating for over 20 years with brands like LOTTO24 and Tipp24. As Germany’s largest digital lottery operator and a trusted partner of Spain’s ONCE, we are passionate about shaping the future of lottery experiences.

 ZEAL Iberia, S.L.U., a leading Company in the management of Lotteries through Internet, has a contract with ONCE to provide Marketing Services to manage and maximize the sales and results of the JuegosONCE website (www.juegosonce.es http://www.juegosonce.es) as well as other digital channels (i.e. mobile, apps).

 

Our team of 350+ professionals from diverse backgrounds is united by a visionary mindset, a passion for collaboration, and a commitment to inspire dreams. At ZEAL, we empower our people to think ambitiously and work together toward a shared purpose: helping people imagine and achieve their aspirations.

 


THE ROLE:

We are looking for a CRM Technical Expert (f/m/d) to join our Marketing Department. The role will support the definition and execution of the CRM strategy, including campaign planning, performance monitoring, and results optimization. The candidate will be responsible for designing and managing campaigns across multiple communication channels such as Email, SMS, Web Push, and App Notifications.

 


YOUR TASKS:

 - Creation, implementation, and optimization of automated email marketing campaigns, using SQL-based segmentation and audience selection to improve engagement and conversion.

 - Creation, layout, and optimization of newsletters and email templates using HTML/CSS, ensuring responsive design and compatibility across major email clients.

 - Support the development and maintenance of automated database processes, including SQL-based data loading and system synchronization workflows.

 - Execution and monitoring of email marketing campaigns, including the creation of briefings and copy, the development of HTML-based email templates, the setup of customer journeys, the definition of audience segments, and the planning and execution of A/B tests to optimize campaign performance.

 - Monitoring, testing, and performance reporting of CRM campaigns to ensure continuous optimization and improved results.

 - Contribute to the definition of promotional offers and campaigns, supporting their implementation and communication through CRM channels to maximize engagement and conversion.




WHAT YOU OFFER:

 - At least 5 years’ experience in managing CRM online.

 - Strong knowledge of CRM platforms and marketing automation tools (Selligent, Salesforce, HubSpot, or similar).

 - Advanced knowledge of SQL, HTML, and CSS.

 - Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and contribute to strategy development and innovative ideas.

 - Experience in managing large databases, including data organization, segmentation, data quality control, and the efficient handling of large volumes of customer information to support CRM campaigns and marketing automation processes.

 - Professional level management of Excel and internal tools: Jira, Confluence, Slack…

 - Excellent communication skills and proficient in English and Spanish.

 - Nice to have: Experience working with Python.

 


WHAT WE OFFER:

 - A modern, dynamic culture grounded in the success of a leading-edge e-commerce company.

 - A talented team of ambitious, like-minded colleagues where your knowledge and ideas truly make an impact.

 - Ongoing personal growth, supported by an annual development budget of €1,500 to invest in your professional development.

 - Trust and autonomy, no micromanagement, just confidence in your ability to deliver and excel.

source_jobs.title: Team Lead Marketing Analytics (f/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE is a dynamic, international group of companies that has been creating exciting and innovative lottery experiences for over 20 years. As Germany’s largest provider of online lotteries through our brands LOTTO24 and Tipp24, and a trusted partner of Spain’s ONCE, the second-largest national lottery, we’re shaping the future of the lottery industry. We are passionate about driving innovation, as demonstrated by our newest brands, Freiheit+ and Traumhausverlosung, which bring fresh and exciting dreams to life. Additionally, through ZEAL Ventures, we invest in inspiring e-commerce start-ups like Omaze and DAYMADE, fueling fresh ideas and opportunities.

Our team of 350+ professionals from diverse backgrounds is united by a visionary mindset, a passion for collaboration, and a commitment to inspire dreams. At ZEAL, we empower our people to think ambitiously and work together toward a shared purpose: helping people imagine and achieve their aspirations.




THE ROLE:

As the Team Lead Marketing Analytics (f/m/d), you will own the marketing analytics domain end to end. You are the senior voice on what gets built, why it matters, and in what order. You partner directly with marketing leadership to translate ambition into a clear, prioritised roadmap, and you lead the team that delivers it.

This is a domain ownership role, not a coordination role. You set direction, manage trade-offs, and represent the marketing analytics agenda in executive conversations. You treat the domain as a portfolio of data products with defined owners, users, success metrics, and lifecycles. You are accountable for outcomes, not activity.

You will also be the senior measurement authority for marketing performance at ZEAL, with hands-on credibility across MMM, attribution, and incrementality. You hold vendors accountable, build internal capability, and ensure decisions on marketing investment are grounded in defensible analytics.




YOUR TASKS:

 - Lead, coach, and grow a multidisciplinary team of analysts, data scientists, and engineers.

 - Foster a high-performance culture focused on development, collaboration, and impact.

 - Own hiring, performance management, succession planning, and capability building.

 - Define and evolve ZEAL’s marketing measurement strategy, including MMM, attribution, incrementality testing, and performance measurement.

 - Establish robust measurement frameworks that support marketing investment decisions.

 - Ensure analytical rigor by validating methodologies, challenging assumptions, and developing internal expertise.

 - Partner with senior leaders across marketing, product, finance, and technology to influence strategy and decision-making.

 - Translate complex analytics into clear, actionable business recommendations.

 - Define and prioritise the marketing analytics roadmap, balancing strategic initiatives with operational needs.

 - Build scalable analytics products and capabilities that drive long-term business value.

 


WHAT YOU OFFER US:

 - 8+ years of experience in analytics, data science, marketing analytics, or a related field.

 - 3+ years of leadership experience managing and developing analytics teams.

 - Proven success building, scaling, and retaining high-performing multidisciplinary teams.

 - Deep expertise in Marketing Mix Modelling (MMM), attribution, incrementality testing, and marketing measurement.

 - Strong understanding of customer acquisition, marketing effectiveness, and profitability optimisation.

 - Ability to shape measurement strategy and critically evaluate analytical methodologies.

 - Excellent executive communication and stakeholder management skills.

 - Experience influencing senior leaders and aligning cross-functional teams around business goals.

 - Strong commercial acumen with the ability to balance business objectives, analytical rigor, and technical constraints.

 - Knowledge of modern MarTech/AdTech ecosystems and experience delivering scalable analytics solut

source_jobs.title: Werkstudent:in Social Media (w/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE ist ein führender internationaler Anbieter von Online-Lotterieprodukten und seit über 20 Jahren mit Marken wie LOTTO24 und Tipp24 aktiv. Als Deutschlands größter digitaler Lotterieanbieter und vertrauenswürdiger Partner von ONCE in Spanien gestalten wir mit Leidenschaft die Zukunft des Lotterieerlebnisses.

 

Traumautoverlosung ist eine der neuesten und aufregendsten Marken von ZEAL. Sie macht den Traum vom eigenen Wunschauto greifbar: mit einem Ticket sichern sich Spielende die Chance auf ein exklusives Fahrzeug. Gleichzeitig unterstützt jede Teilnahme soziale Projekte, sodass aus der Gewinnchance ein echter sozialer Mehrwert entsteht. Die Traumautoverlosung verbindet den Nervenkitzel des Gewinnens mit einer bedeutenden sozialen Auswirkung und spiegelt damit ZEALs Engagement für Innovation und soziale Verantwortung wider. Sie bietet den Teilnehmenden mehr als nur ein Spiel - die Chance, Gutes zu tun und gleichzeitig groß zu träumen.



Für unser Traumautoverlosung-Team suchen wir jemanden, der Lust auf Social Media, Content und digitale Trends hat. Du unterstützt uns dabei, unser Start-up auf Social Media weiter wachsen zu lassen, bringst eigene Ideen mit ein und bist nah dran am Aufbau einer Marke, die gerade dabei ist, richtig groß zu werden.




DEINE AUFGABEN:

 - Unseren Social-Auftritt Stück für Stück auf das nächste Level bringen (deiner Kreativität sind hier keine Grenzen gesetzt 🚀)

 - Assets und Content für Instagram, TikTok & YouTube erstellen

 - Ein echtes Gefühl dafür entwickeln, was Menschen feiern, teilen und kommentieren

 - Community, Trends und Performance immer mit im Blick haben




WAS DU MITBRINGST:

 - Eingeschriebene:r Student:in (z. B. Marketing, Medien, Kommunikation, BWL, Digital Business o. ä.)

 - Interesse an Autos und Auto-Content (du musst hier aber wirklich kein Auto-Experte sein ☺️)

 - Begeisterung für TikTok, Instagram, YouTube & aktuelle Trends

 - Erste Erfahrung mit Social Media, Postings oder Content Creation

 - Gutes Gespür für Trends, Formate und virale Inhalte

 - Idealerweise schon erste Erfahrung mit Canva (aber kein Muss)

 - Strukturierte, eigenständige und zuverlässige Arbeitsweise

 - Sicherer Umgang mit den gängigen Office- und Kollaborationstools (MS 365, etc.)

 - Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse

 - Gute Englischkenntnisse




WAS WIR ANBIETEN:

 - Eine moderne, dynamische Unternehmenskultur, basierend auf dem Erfolg eines innovativen E-Commerce-Unternehmens.

 - Ein talentiertes Team aus ambitionierten, gleichgesinnten Kolleg*innen, in dem dein Wissen und deine Ideen wirklich etwas bewegen.

 - Vertrauen und Eigenverantwortung – kein Mikromanagement, sondern echtes Vertrauen in deine Fähigkeiten, hervorragende Ergebnisse zu liefern.

 - Flexible Arbeitsmöglichkeiten mit einem hybriden Arbeitsmodell, das auf Resultate fokussiert ist.

 - Möglichkeit zu Workations im Ausland über unser WorkFlex-Tool.

 - Monatlicher Mobilitätszuschuss von 30 €, den du für das Verkehrsmittel deiner Wahl nutzen kannst (z. B. das Deutschlandticket), sowie Zugang zu einem Fahrrad-Leasing-Programm.

 - Betriebliche Altersvorsorge in Zusammenarbeit mit Degura zur Absicherung deiner finanziellen Zukunft.

 - Geförderte EGYM WELLPASS-Mitgliedschaft – du zahlst nur 25 € pro Monat und erhältst Zugang zu zahlreichen Fitnessstudios und Sportangeboten in ganz Deutschland.

 - Monatliche Firmenevents sowie regelmäßige Teamaktivitäten und informelle Treffen – besonders beliebt: unsere kostenlose Lunches von Montag bis Donnerstag im Büro!



Bereit, Product & Marketing mitzugestalten?
Dann schick uns deinen Lebenslauf! Willst du dich besonders hervorheben? Dann schicke uns ein kurzes Video (z. B. via GDrive, WeTransfer oder YouTube), in dem du uns zeigst, warum du zu uns passt.



Wir freuen uns auf dich! 🎯

source_jobs.title: Working Student Project Management (f/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE is a leading international provider of online lottery products, operating for over 20 years with brands like LOTTO24 and Tipp24. As Germany’s largest digital lottery operator and a trusted partner of Spain’s ONCE, we are passionate about shaping the future of lottery experiences.


Traumhausverlosung is one of ZEAL’s newest and most exciting brands. It gives players the chance to win stunning, fully furnished dream homes through an accessible, thrilling lottery format, while supporting a good cause. Every ticket sold not only offers participants the opportunity to transform their lives, but also contributes to charitable projects, making a real difference in communities across Germany. By combining the excitement of winning with a meaningful social impact, Traumhausverlosung reflects ZEAL’s commitment to innovation, social responsibility, and offering customers more than just a game, but a chance to do good while dreaming big.




YOUR TASKS:

 - Support in the planning, coordination, and follow-up of real estate and home staging projects.

 - Coordination of appointments with craftsmen, service providers, and internal stakeholders.

 - Preparation, support, and follow-up of internal and external meetings.

 - Organization of furniture, decoration, materials, and project logistics.

 - Maintenance of project plans, checklists, status overviews, and documentation.

 - Obtaining, comparing, and managing quotations from external service providers.

 - Creation and maintenance of inventory lists.

 - Research on real estate markets, interior design trends, service providers, and materials.

 - General administrative and operational support in day-to-day business and ongoing projects.

 - Optional on-site support at the “Traumhaus.”




WHAT YOU OFFER US:

 - Currently enrolled in a degree program in Business Administration, Real Estate Management, Project Management, Civil Engineering, or a related field for at least one year.

 - Initial practical experience in project management is an advantage.

 - Confident use of MS Office, especially Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook.

 - Strong organizational and coordination skills, as well as an independent working style.

 - Excellent communication skills when interacting with clients, service providers, and internal stakeholders.

 - Reliability, flexibility, and the ability to work under pressure in a dynamic project environment.

 - Valid Class B driver’s license.

 - Fluent German and English language skills.




WHAT WE OFFER:

 - A modern, dynamic culture grounded in the success of a leading-edge e-commerce company.

 - A talented team of ambitious, like-minded colleagues where your knowledge and ideas truly make an impact.

 - Trust and autonomy, no micromanagement, just confidence in your ability to deliver and excel.

 - Flexible work options with a hybrid setup focused on results.

 - Opportunity for workations abroad using our WorkFlex tool.

 - Monthly mobility allowance of €30 to use on the mobility option of your choice (e.g., the Deutschlandticket), plus access to a company bike leasing program.

 - Company pension scheme, provided in partnership with Degura, to support your future financial security.

 - Subsidized EGYM WELLPASS membership, with a contribution of only €25 per month, giving you access to a wide range of gyms and sports options across Germany.

 - Monthly company events, team activities, and informal gatherings, including our popular company-wide lunches provided four days a week.

source_jobs.title: Senior Data Engineer (f/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE is an international group shaping the future of digital lotteries and dream-driven experiences. As Germany’s leading online lottery provider through LOTTO24 and Tipp24, and a partner of Spain’s ONCE, ZEAL combines innovation, technology, and entertainment to inspire millions of customers. With ventures such as Freiheit+, Traumhausverlosung, Traumautoverlosung and ZEAL Ventures, the company also invests in new business models and emerging e-commerce brands. Driven by a diverse team of 350+ professionals, ZEAL fosters a collaborative, ambitious culture focused on turning dreams into reality.

 


THE ROLE:

As a Senior Data Engineer, you'll be at the forefront of modern data tech, driving the development of our data ecosystem. Here's what you'll dive into:

 


YOUR TASKS:

 - Seamlessly collect, process, store, and optimize company data to unlock its full power.

 - Develop cutting-edge data solutions from the ground up, collaborating with various stakeholders from design to deployment.

 - Identify automation opportunities for existing and new applications to enhance efficiency.

 - Create a DataOps strategy and champion best practices to ensure data reliability and scalability.

 - Innovate and enhance data quality and architecture within your scope.

 - Push the boundaries of innovation by embracing the latest technologies and methodologies.

 


WHAT YOU OFFER US:

 - Proficiency in Agile Software Development methodologies.

 - Comfortable with Python, Kotlin, and Golang, and eager to explore new data technologies.

 - Proficient in ML frameworks and libraries, able to work closely with Data Scientists to optimize data solutions.

 - Technical Chops: Experience in architecting and developing production-grade data solutions.

 - Passionate about working with large-scale datasets, highly skilled in SQL and big data tools like Kafka.

 - Proficient in Cloud Data Warehouse systems such as Redshift, Snowflake, or BigQuery.

 - Familiar with Modern Data Stack, Data Mesh, GitOps, and ideally experienced with dbt.

 - Ability to translate business needs into technical requirements effectively.

 - Confidence in working with AI tools like Claude Code are a nice to have.

 - Strong communication skills in English with a collaborative spirit.

 


WHAT WE OFFER:

 - State-of-the-art technologies and an agile environment (Check our Tech Radar: https://lotto24.github.io/tech-radar/)

 - A modern, dynamic culture grounded in the success of a leading-edge e-commerce company.

 - A talented team of ambitious, like-minded colleagues where your knowledge and ideas truly make an impact.

 - Ongoing personal growth, supported by an annual development budget of €1,500 to invest in your professional development.

 - Trust and autonomy, no micromanagement, just confidence in your ability to deliver and excel.

 - Flexible work options with a hybrid setup focused on results.

 - Unlimited vacation days in addition to your yearly 30-day vacation allowance.

 - Opportunity for workations abroad using our WorkFlex tool.

 - Monthly mobility allowance of €30 to use on the mobility option of your choice (e.g., the Deutschlandticket), plus access to a company bike leasing program.

 - Company pension scheme, provided in partnership with Degura, to support your future financial security.

 - Subsidized EGYM WELLPASS membership, with a contribution of only €25 per month, giving you access to a wide range of gyms and sports options across Germany.

 - Quarterly company events, along with regular team activities and informal gatherings, a favorite being our Healthy Tuesday lunches or Treat Thursdays in the office!

source_jobs.title: Team Lead Engineering - Platform (f/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE is a dynamic, international group of companies that has been creating exciting and innovative lottery experiences for over 20 years. As Germany’s largest provider of online lotteries through our brands LOTTO24 and Tipp24, and a trusted partner of Spain’s ONCE, the second-largest national lottery, we’re shaping the future of the lottery industry. We are passionate about driving innovation, as demonstrated by our newest brands, Freiheit+ and Traumhausverlosung, which bring fresh and exciting dreams to life. Additionally, through ZEAL Ventures, we invest in inspiring e-commerce start-ups like Omaze and DAYMADE, fueling fresh ideas and opportunities.

Our team of 350+ professionals from diverse backgrounds is united by a visionary mindset, a passion for collaboration, and a commitment to inspire dreams. At ZEAL, we empower our people to think ambitiously and work together toward a shared purpose: helping people imagine and achieve their aspirations.



As our Engineering Team Lead (f/m/d), you combine strong people leadership with hands-on technical expertise to guide and grow a high-performing team. Your team owns its domain and sits at the heart of Zeal's B2B core platform: its customers are the core platform teams themselves, whom you enable with reliable, scalable shared services.




YOUR TASKS:

 - You lead a platform-focused engineering team responsible for building reliable, scalable shared services that enable all product teams

 - Hire, Build and lead a team of 2 engineers: Hire, develop, and grow a high-performing team, fostering an ownership-driven and reliability-focused engineering culture

 - Champion the effective use of AI in your team's engineering workflows (e.g. AI-assisted development and tooling) and explore opportunities to apply AI within the platform's capabilities

 - Establish and drive reliability practices: Design and implement monkey testing and load testing strategies to proactively identify weaknesses and continuously improve platform resilience and stability

 - Own prioritization and backlog: Balance reliability, tech debt, operational, and business demands with stakeholders across Core, Product, and Platform, keeping a transparent roadmap focused on the highest-value work.

 - Own core technical services: Take end-to-end ownership of internally developed platform services such as Auth Service, API Gateway, ensuring they are scalable, reliable, and easy to consume

 - Act as the bridge between domains: Collaborate closely with Core domain teams and the Platform team to understand needs, identify gaps, and provide efficient, reusable technical solutions

 - Enable data and event flows: Own and evolve solutions core technical tracking infrastructure, ensuring reliable and scalable event collection and forwarding to downstream systems

 - Deliver secure, robust and maintainable technical solutions while focusing on great customer experiences and business needs




WHAT YOU OFFER US:

 - Proven people leadership skills with the ability to grow teams from early stage to high performance

 - Strong hands-on engineering background in Kotlin/Spring Boot, Mongo/PostgresDB ideally paired with DevOps experience

 - Experience designing and operating reliable, scalable distributed systems, including resilience patterns and failure handling

 - Strong understanding of observability, monitoring, and performance testing including load/monkey testing

 - Experience building and evolving internal platform services and APIs that are easy for other teams to consume

 - “You build it, you run it” mindset with hands-on experience running services in Kubernetes-based environments

 - Ability to balance standardi

You'll drive technical and architectural decisions, contribute to the codebase yourself, and ensure your team's services strengthen Zeal's B2B core platform. Working closely with Product Management and stakeholders, you'll balance business goals, customer experience, and technical excellence.




YOUR TASKS:

 - You lead a product-focused engineering team that builds and evolves Zeal's core B2B platform capabilities for internal business customers

 - Lead technically and strategically, define and drive architectural decisions together with your team

 - Code as part of the team: While guiding architecture and strategy, you’ll regularly write code, contribute to features, and help solve complex technical challenges together with your team

 - Deliver secure, robust and maintainable technical solutions while focusing on great customer experiences and business needs

 - Drive collaboration: Work closely with other teams to align APIs, technical interfaces, and architectural consistency

source_jobs.title: (Senior) Quality Assurance Engineer (f/m/d)
source_jobs.description:
ZEAL Network SE is an international group shaping the future of digital lotteries and dream-driven experiences. As Germany’s leading online lottery provider through LOTTO24 and Tipp24, and a partner of Spain’s ONCE, ZEAL combines innovation, technology, and entertainment to inspire millions of customers. With ventures such as Freiheit+, Traumhausverlosung, Traumautoverlosung and ZEAL Ventures, the company also invests in new business models and emerging e-commerce brands. Driven by a diverse team of 350+ professionals, ZEAL fosters a collaborative, ambitious culture focused on turning dreams into reality.

As a (Senior) Quality Assurance Engineer (f/m/d) in our Games Production Team, you will ensure the quality, functionality, and security of our growing portfolio of slot games, instant-win games, and scratchcards. Your work plays a critical role in delivering a reliable and enjoyable experience for players, while also upholding regulatory compliance and safeguarding the integrity of our gaming platform. You’ll help establish and continuously improve QA practices that make our games robust, testable, and ready for release in regulated markets.

 


YOUR TASKS:

 - Design, build, and maintain automated test suites tailored for slots, instant-win games, and scratchcards, while performing manual testing during development and release phases.

 - Define and evolve test strategies that address the unique challenges of game testing — including animations, UI responsiveness, game state complexity, and random outcomes.

 - Collaborate with Game Developers, Game Designers, and Artists in a creative and agile environment.

 - Maintain structured test documentation, including test plans, bug reports, and regression checklists.

 - Execute cross-device and cross-browser testing to validate performance, consistency, and responsiveness across platforms.

 - Ensure compliance with regulatory standards, and support certification-related QA tasks such as preparing test evidence or assisting with audits for relevant jurisdictions (especially Germany). Prior knowledge is a plus, but can also be acquired on the job.

 - Advocate for a player-first quality mindset, helping the team prevent critical issues that could impact the game experience or platform reputation.

 


WHAT YOU OFFER US:

 - Practical experience in testing online games, ideally including slot games, scratchcards, or instant-win mechanics. iGaming industry experience is highly desirable.

 - A solid understanding of game testing challenges, including randomness, animations, math models, and edge-case scenarios.

 - Familiarity with basic probability and mathematics used in slot game design (e.g., RTP, volatility, win frequency) is a strong plus.

 - Proficiency with Playwright and TypeScript or similar frameworks for frontend automation.

 - Experience in manual exploratory testing—you know how to think like a player and uncover hidden issues.

 - Understanding of QA standards and compliance requirements for regulated markets (e.g., Germany, UK, MGA).

 - Strong collaboration skills and a proactive mindset—you’re ready to take ownership of quality in a fast-moving team.

 - Strong English skills are required for collaboration within the team.

 - Fluency in German is a nice-to-have.

 


WHAT WE OFFER:

 - State-of-the-art technologies and an agile environment (Check our Tech Radar: https://lotto24.github.io/tech-radar/)

 - A modern, dynamic culture grounded in the success of a leading-edge e-commerce company.

 - A talented team of ambitious, like-minded colleagues where your knowledge and ideas truly make an impact.

 - Ongoing personal growth, supported by an annual development budget of €1,500 to invest in your professional development.

 - Trust and autonomy, no micromanagement, just confidence in your ability to deliver and excel.

 - Flexible work options with a hybrid setup focused on results.

 - Unlimited vacation days in addition to your yearly 30-day vacation allowan

notes: ZEAL Network SE is a leading international provider of online lottery products with a diverse range of job postings, including tech, marketing, and product roles.
